name: Tony Strudwick
bio: Tony Strudwick is a highly experienced performance specialist who served as Head of Sports Science and Fitness at Manchester United from 2007 to 2016, contributing to the club's success during this period. He subsequently held Head of Performance positions with the England National Team (2016-2018) and West Bromwich Albion (2018-2019), bringing his expertise in sports science and strength & conditioning to elite football. He currently works as Head of Performance and Medical at WBA, continuing to apply his specialized knowledge in performance optimization and conditioning.

name: Dave Carolan
bio: Dave Carolan is a Performance/Sports Science Specialist with expertise in strength and conditioning and athletic performance optimization. He specializes in developing and implementing evidence-based training programs to enhance athlete performance across various sports disciplines. Dave applies his knowledge of sports science principles to help athletes achieve their performance goals through comprehensive strength and conditioning methodologies.
